name: Turkey Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 1 15.5 oz can dark red kidney beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Place foil handles in the Crock-Pot.
2. Place one corn tortilla in the bottom of the Crock-Pot.
3. Spoon a small amount of enchilada sauce, beans, turkey, and cheese over the tortilla.
4. Continue layering until all tortillas are used. Ensure that the last layer is the cheese layer.
5. Cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Remove by foil handles and slice into pie-shaped wedges for serving.
